title: Axon: A Shockingly Good Business With A Twist
text: Axon Enterprise, Inc. has a dominant position in the U.S. I do not believe that Axon will have an easy time expanding into international markets.

title: Axon (AXON) Stock Jumps 5.6%: Will It Continue to Soar?
text: Axon (AXON) was a big mover last session on higher-than-average trading volume. The latest trend in earnings estimate revisions might not help the stock continue moving higher in the near term.
